channel.title: Agentic Architect — Daily Senior Rule
channel.description: One practical Cursor + C#/.NET pattern per day. Field notes from building a stateful AI partner for production .NET codebases.

item.title: The Scoped→Singleton DI bug your AI just suggested (and how to catch it)
item.description: The .NET lifetime bug that ships silently — and the Cursor rule that catches it before merge.

item.title: The Context Tax: Why every Cursor session costs you 15 minutes
item.description: The hidden cost senior engineers pay every morning — and a four-rule architecture for eliminating it.
